hooks.command: script=; dir="$PWD"; while [ "$dir" != / ]; do if [ -f "$dir/.claude/hooks/claude-code-setup-hint.py" ]; then script="$dir/.claude/hooks/claude-code-setup-hint.py"; break; fi; dir="$(dirname "$dir")"; done; if [ -n "$script" ]; then python3 "$script"; fi # claude-code-setup-verify-hint
